SDE.settings.combatMovementDefault.name: Combat movement default (ft)
SDE.settings.combatMovementDefault.hint: Default movement budget per combatant turn. Token's ruler colors red when the move exceeds this from the turn-start position.
SDE.settings.oocMovementBudget.name: Out-of-combat movement budget (ft)
SDE.settings.oocMovementBudget.hint: Default movement budget per crawl turn. Reset on Next Crawl Turn.
SDE.settings.oocEnforceBudget.name: Enforce out-of-combat movement budget
SDE.settings.oocEnforceBudget.hint: If on, refuse moves that exceed the crawl budget. Off: still colors red but lets the move commit.
SDE.settings.combatEnforceBudget.name: Enforce combat movement budget
SDE.settings.combatEnforceBudget.hint: If on, refuse combat moves that exceed the remaining movement. Default off — Shadowdark combat traditionally relies on player honesty rather than hard enforcement.
SDE.settings.hideHiddenNpcCards.name: Hide hidden NPCs from the strip
SDE.settings.hideHiddenNpcCards.hint: If on, combatants with token.hidden or combatant.hidden are suppressed from the strip.
SDE.settings.warnIfCrawlHelperEnabled.hi: Shows a notification at world load if shadowdark-crawl-helper is active. Disable to suppress.
SDE.notifications.crawlHelperConflict: Shadowdark Enhancer detected that shadowdark-crawl-helper is also enabled. For best results, disable Crawl Helper. (You can suppress this warning in Module Settings.)
SDE.settings.encounterRollGMOnly.name: Roll Encounters as GM-only
SDE.settings.encounterRollGMOnly.hint: If on, encounter check results and roller cards are whispered to the GM only.
SDE.settings.pauseOnEncounter.name: Pause game on encounter
SDE.settings.pauseOnEncounter.hint: Automatically pause the game when an encounter check results in a hit.
SDE.settings.autoRollActiveTable.name: Auto-roll active table on hit
SDE.settings.autoRollActiveTable.hint: If on, an encounter hit will automatically draw from the active roll table.
SDE.encounter.browse.sources.empty: No sources selected. Configure at the top of this tab.
SDE.settings.charBuilderStatMethod.name: Character Builder — ability roll method
SDE.settings.charBuilderStatMethod.hint: The ability-generation method the builder uses. GM-dictated — players roll with whatever is set here and cannot change it.
SDE.settings.charBuilderDiceSoNice.name: Character Builder — animate dice (Dice So Nice)
SDE.settings.charBuilderDiceSoNice.hint: Play the 3D Dice So Nice animation for the builder's ability, HP, and gold rolls. Off by default — the roll's audit chat card still posts, just without the 3D dice.
SDE.charBuilder.title: Character Builder
SDE.charBuilder.stats.desc: Roll your six ability scores using the method your GM has set.
SDE.charBuilder.stats.method.label: Method
SDE.charBuilder.stats.method.4d6Assign: 4d6 Drop Lowest, Assign as You Like
SDE.charBuilder.stats.assignHint: Drag a die onto a stat to place it. Drag it back to the pool — or click a filled stat — to return it.
SDE.charBuilder.stats.rerollEligible: No score reached 14 — you may reroll the entire array.
SDE.charBuilder.selectPrompt: Choose an option from the list.
SDE.charBuilder.ancestry.name: Name
SDE.charBuilder.class.rollPrompt: Roll your level-1 talent on the class talent table.
SDE.charBuilder.class.chooseOne: Choose one of the rolled options:
SDE.charBuilder.class.talentManual: This class's talent table isn't linked to an item — add this talent to your sheet manually.
SDE.charBuilder.class.noTalentRolled: No talent for this result — reroll.
SDE.charBuilder.class.asksOnCreateHint: This talent asks for its choice (weapon, stat, …) when the character is created.
SDE.charBuilder.class.choiceNeeded: Pick an option to complete this step
SDE.charBuilder.gear.browse: Browse gear on the left, then add it to your pack.
SDE.charBuilder.gear.empty: No gear yet. Add items from the list.
SDE.charBuilder.commit.title: Create Character
SDE.charBuilder.commit.sentToGm: Character request sent to the GM.
SDE.charBuilder.commit.noGm: No GM is online to create your character. Ask your GM to log in and try again.
SDE.charBuilder.commit.failed: Character creation failed — see the console for details.
SDE.charBuilder.languages.noChoices: Your ancestry and class grant no additional language choices.
SDE.charBuilder.alignment.title: Title
SDE.charBuilder.alignment.lawfulDesc: Champions of order, honor, and duty. You keep your word and protect the innocent.
SDE.charBuilder.alignment.neutralDesc: Guided by balance and pragmatism. You take each situation as it comes.
SDE.charBuilder.alignment.chaoticDesc: Driven by freedom and self-interest. You answer to no one but yourself.
SDE.charBuilder.deity.optional: Choose a deity (optional), or roll Random. Priests should pick one that fits.
SDE.charBuilder.deity.mismatch: This deity's alignment differs from your character's.
SDE.charBuilder.deity.fixedByClass: Your class worships this deity — it's fixed.
SDE.charBuilder.hp.needClass: Choose a class first — hit points come from its hit die.
SDE.settings.charBuilderMaxLevel1HP.name: Character Builder — max Level-1 HP
SDE.settings.charBuilderMaxLevel1HP.hint: If on, the builder sets Level-1 hit points to the class hit die maximum + CON instead of rolling.
SDE.settings.charBuilderStartingGold.hin: A fixed gold amount for new characters. Set 0 to roll the standard 2d6×5 gp in the builder.
SDE.settings.charBuilderTableSources.hin: Pick which roll tables the builder's Ancestry step offers as Name and Trinket sources.
SDE.charBuilder.tableSources.title: Character Builder — Name & Trinket Tables
SDE.charBuilder.tableSources.hint: Check the roll tables the builder draws from: Names & Trinkets (Ancestry step) and Backgrounds & Deities (the Origins step's Random). Name/Trinket tables naming a specific ancestry are only used for that ancestry; generic tables apply to everyone. Nothing checked = default behavior. Players never see these choices — with several tables checked, rolls pick one at random and dropdowns merge all options.
SDE.charBuilder.tableSources.showAll: Show all tables (not just name/trinket matches)
SDE.settings.lootDropEnabled.name: Enable loot drops
SDE.settings.lootDropEnabled.hint: Let the GM drop loot and coin piles onto the canvas for players to pick up from the token HUD.
SDE.settings.xpThresholdNormal.name: Treasure XP threshold — normal (gp)
SDE.settings.xpThresholdNormal.hint: Minimum gold value for generated treasure to grant normal treasure XP.
SDE.settings.xpThresholdFabulous.name: Treasure XP threshold — fabulous (gp)
SDE.settings.xpThresholdFabulous.hint: Minimum gold value for generated treasure to count as fabulous (higher XP).
SDE.settings.uniqueFeatureChance.name: Magic item unique-feature chance (%)
SDE.settings.uniqueFeatureChance.hint: Percent chance that a generated magic item gains a unique feature. 100 = always.
